case_title: SAFECO INSURANCE CO., et al vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFECO INSURANCE CO. TEICH, HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BATISTO, RUGONO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-14-1994
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-04-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 TO BE DISMISSED BY 11/10/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
